title: Sanitized tool output is shown safely in chat history
description: Verifies that when a message contains common prompt-injection phrases, the displayed conversation shows a safe, sanitized tool-context output rather than raw injection content.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat page from the app entry route
Click to create a new chat thread
Fill a message containing tool-output-like text that includes an instruction to ignore previous instructions into the message composer
Send the message
Wait for the assistant response to finish streaming
Reload the page
Verify the thread history is persisted and displays sanitized tool-context output without showing raw prompt-injection instructions

title: Short casual message routes as a lightweight task
description: Verifies that sending a short casual user message results in the UI indicating a lightweight classification or routing outcome for the response.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat page from the app entry route
Click to create a new chat thread
Fill a short casual message into the message composer
Send the message
Wait for the assistant response to finish streaming
Verify the UI indicates the message was classified or routed as a lightweight task

title: Add an integration credential and see it listed
description: Verifies an authenticated user can add an integration credential and it appears in their configured integrations list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to integrations
Start adding a new integration by selecting a type
Fill in the required credential fields with valid-looking values
Submit to save the integration
Verify the new integration appears in the user's configured integrations list

title: Create memory entry and see it in the memory list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a memory entry and it appears in their memory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to memory
Create a new memory entry with content "Prefers concise answers"
Verify the new memory entry appears in the memory list

title: Code-like message routes as a code task
description: Verifies that sending a message containing programming keywords results in the UI indicating a code-capable classification or routing outcome.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat page from the app entry route
Click to create a new chat thread
Fill a message requesting code and containing code keywords into the message composer
Send the message
Wait for the assistant response to finish streaming
Verify the UI indicates the message was classified or routed as a code task

title: Test an existing integration connection
description: Verifies an authenticated user can run the integration test action and see a success or failure outcome displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to integrations
Add a new integration by selecting a type and saving required credential fields
Run the test action for the newly added integration
Verify the UI shows a test result outcome for the integration

title: Delete a memory entry
description: Verifies an authenticated user can delete a memory entry and it is removed from the memory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to memory
Create a new memory entry with content "Temporary note"
Delete the newly created memory entry
Verify the deleted memory entry no longer appears in the memory list

title: Remove an integration credential
description: Verifies an authenticated user can remove a configured integration and it disappears from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to integrations
Add a new integration by selecting a type and saving required credential fields
Remove the newly added integration
Verify the removed integration no longer appears in the user's configured integrations list

title: Multiple injection patterns are filtered throughout the content
description: Verifies that when a message contains multiple prompt-injection patterns, the conversation shows that all such content is filtered consistently rather than partially leaked.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat page from the app entry route
Click to create a new chat thread
Fill a message containing multiple prompt-injection patterns in different casing into the message composer
Send the message
Wait for the assistant response to finish streaming
Verify the displayed conversation does not expose any of the injected instruction strings and instead shows filtered placeholders or sanitized tool-context content

title: Edit an existing memory entry
description: Verifies an authenticated user can update a memory entry and the updated content is shown in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to memory
Create a new memory entry with content "Likes weekend workouts"
Edit that memory entry and change content to "Likes weekday workouts"
Verify the memory list shows the updated content "Likes weekday workouts"

title: Create and run a workflow end-to-end
description: Verifies a user can create a workflow with steps and run it to obtain aggregated run results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to workflows
Create a new workflow with a name and at least one valid step
Run the newly created workflow
Verify workflow run results are displayed with an overall completion status

title: Empty tool output does not break chat message send
description: Verifies that sending an empty-content tool-output-like message does not error and the assistant still responds normally.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat page from the app entry route
Click to create a new chat thread
Fill an empty string into the message composer
Press Enter to send
Wait for the assistant response to finish streaming
Verify an assistant response is displayed in the thread without an error state

title: Run a workflow that triggers a tool call and returns per-step outputs
description: Verifies running a workflow with a tool-using step produces per-step outputs and an aggregated result view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to workflows
Create a new workflow configured with a step that uses an available tool in the app
Run the workflow
Verify the run results show step-level outputs including a tool execution result

title: Workflow run with tool-capable steps returns aggregated results in UI
description: Verifies that running a workflow configured with steps that can produce tool calls completes and shows an aggregated workflow result to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to the workflows area from the app entry route
Create a new workflow with at least one step configured to allow tool usage
Save the workflow
Run the workflow
Verify a workflow run result is displayed and includes aggregated output from the steps

title: List previously created workflows
description: Verifies a user can view their workflows list after creating a workflow and see it present.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to workflows
Create a new workflow with a unique name and at least one valid step
Return to the workflows list view
Verify the newly created workflow appears in the workflows list

title: Delete a workflow
description: Verifies a user can delete a workflow and it no longer appears in the workflows list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to workflows
Create a new workflow with a unique name and at least one valid step
Delete the newly created workflow from the list
Verify the deleted workflow no longer appears in the workflows list

title: Classifier fallback applies when last message is not a user message
description: Verifies that if the latest visible message context is not a user message (e.g., assistant message is last), the next run falls back to the default classification behavior shown in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the chat page from the app entry route
Click to create a new chat thread
Fill a normal user message into the message composer
Send the message
Wait for the assistant response to finish streaming
Fill a follow-up message that references the previous assistant reply into the message composer
Send the message
Verify the UI indicates a default or fallback classification/routing was used for the follow-up

title: Navigate from landing page to sign-in
description: Verifies a visitor can start sign-in by navigating from the landing page to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sign-in link
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Prevent workflow creation with invalid steps
description: Verifies the workflow builder blocks saving when steps are invalid and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to workflows
Start creating a new workflow with a name
Leave the steps configuration invalid or incomplete
Attempt to save the workflow
Verify a validation error is visible and the workflow is not created

title: Memory list reflects create and delete in one session
description: Verifies memory list state updates correctly after creating and deleting entries without needing a full page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to memory
Create a new memory entry with content "Session state check"
Delete the same memory entry from the list
Verify the memory list updates to remove the deleted entry without requiring a manual refresh

title: Navigate from documentation to sign-in
description: Verifies a visitor can start sign-in from the documentation page by navigating to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs
Click the sign-in link
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Workflow run succeeds with no tools configured
description: Verifies that running a workflow with no tool schemas configured completes without errors and still returns a workflow result.

steps.description: Navigate to the workflows area from the app entry route
Create a new workflow with steps that do not configure any tools
Save the workflow
Run the workflow
Verify the workflow run completes and displays a result rather than an error state

title: Handle integration test with malformed or missing integration selection
description: Verifies the integration testing flow prevents running a test without selecting a valid configured integration and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to integrations
Open the integration test UI without selecting a configured integration
Attempt to run the integration test
Verify a validation error is visible and no test result is produced

title: View available integration types without authentication
description: Verifies a user can view the catalog of available integration types.

steps.description: Navigate to the integrations page via the app entry route
Click the link to view integrations
Verify a list of available integration types is displayed

title: Open documentation from landing page
description: Verifies a visitor can reach in-app documentation from the landing page and view documentation content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view documentation
Verify documentation content is displayed

title: View documentation page
description: Verifies a visitor can load the documentation page and see readable documentation content.

steps.description: Navigate to /docs
Verify documentation content is displayed

title: Allow creating an empty memory entry
description: Verifies an authenticated user can save a memory entry with empty content and it appears in the memory list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to memory
Create a new memory entry leaving the content empty
Verify the memory list includes a newly created entry with empty content

title: View landing page content
description: Verifies a visitor can load the landing page and see primary marketing content without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page main content is displayed
